purchasePrices.title: Purchase prices
purchasePrices.taxRateField: Tax rate % (no rate set on the product)
purchasePrices.marginHint: net sell price − usual net purchase price

auth.signUpDescription: Sign up with your email and password
auth.inviteBanner: Sign in to join the organization you've been invited to.
auth.inviteRegisterBanner: You've been invited to join an organization. Register to get started.

serverLoading.title: Server is starting up…
serverLoading.description: The backend services are not ready yet. This usually takes a few moments after a restart.
serverLoading.timeout: The server is still not reachable. Please check if the backend is running.

onboarding.youllBeAdmin: You'll be set as the admin

dashboard.refillBanner: {count} machine needs refilling | {count} machines need refilling
dashboard.revenuePerDay: Revenue per day for the last 30 days
dashboard.companyInsightsEmpty: No fleet analysis yet. Click below to generate insights across all your machines.

machines.title: Vending Machines
machines.addMachineDescription: Create a vending machine. You can assign a device to it later.

refill.title: Refill Tour
refill.confirmFailedTitle: Refill could not be saved after 3 attempts
refill.noItemsPacked: Check at least one item to start the tour
refill.warehouseDeductionHint: Warehouse stock will be deducted when starting the tour

tourHistory.title: Tour History
tourHistory.subtitle: Past refill tours and their details

machineDetail.sendCreditDescription: Send a credit amount to {name}. The device will dispense the next item selected.
machineDetail.slotMustBePositive: Slot number must be 0 or greater
machineDetail.startSlotPositive: Start slot must be 0 or greater
machineDetail.publicListingDescription: When enabled, this machine appears on the public /m/ discovery map and the operator page.
machineDetail.qrCodeHint: Print this QR code and place it on the machine. Customers can scan it to view products and pay.
machineDetail.publicListingDisabledHint: Public listing disabled. The direct URL still works for employees, but the machine won't appear in discovery views.
machineDetail.noUnassignedDevices: No unassigned devices available. Provision a new device first.
machineDetail.selectDevice: Select an available device to assign to this machine. The machine configuration (trays, products, sales history) will be preserved.
machineDetail.noSalesLast30: No sales recorded in the last 30 days.
machineDetail.noMdbDiagnostics: No MDB diagnostics received yet. The device will start reporting after connecting.
machineDetail.restartDeviceHint: Remotely restart the device. The device will reconnect automatically after rebooting.
machineDetail.deviceMustBeOnline: Device must be online to send a restart command.
machineDetail.mdbAddressHint: The MDB address determines how the cashless device is addressed on the bus. Change only if multiple devices are connected.
machineDetail.noTraysConfiguredDetail: No trays configured. Add trays to track stock levels.
machineDetail.batchDescription: Create multiple trays with sequential slot numbers. Existing slots are skipped.
machineDetail.minStockTooltip: Minimum stock. Triggers a refill alert when stock drops to or below this number.
machineDetail.fillThresholdTooltip: Fill threshold. When already restocking, also top up trays below this level.
machineDetail.belowMinimum: {count} tray below minimum | {count} trays below minimum
machineDetail.aiNoRecommendations: No recommendations at this time. The machine is performing well.
machineDetail.addSaleDescription: Manually record a sale for this machine.
machineDetail.deleteSaleConfirm: This sale will be permanently deleted and the stock for the corresponding tray will be restored by 1 unit. This action cannot be undone.
machineDetail.saleDateHint: Defaults to now. Can be set to a past date for missed sales.
machineDetail.noStockHistory: No stock history for this tray yet.
machineDetail.stockHistoryNoMachine: Device not assigned to any machine
machineDetail.stockHistoryNoTray: No matching tray configured for this slot
machineDetail.suppressedHint: Sales auto-dropped as suspected brownout re-reports.
machineDetail.suppressedRestoreConfirmBody: This adds a real sale and reduces stock by 1.

machineSettings.title: Machine settings
machineSettings.countryAutoHint: Derived from address, can be overridden
machineSettings.nayaxMachineIdHint: Required for Nayax sales reconciliation. You can find this ID in your Nayax back-office.

analysis.title: Product performance
analysis.subtitle: Spot underperforming products in the machine layout and swap in better ones.
analysis.noTrays: No trays configured for this machine yet.
analysis.emptySlotHint: This slot is empty — fill it with a strong or new product:
analysis.testingHint: Recently added — still within its trial window (across all its slots), so it isn't judged as dead stock yet.
analysis.swapHint: Applying reassigns slot {slot} to this product and resets its stock to 0.
analysis.moreResults: Refine your search to see more
analysis.noAiSwaps: The AI found no product-swap recommendations for this machine.

products.title: Products
products.taxClassRequired: Tax class is required for new categories.
products.taxClassWarningBanner: {count} categories have no tax class assigned. Assign tax classes in the Categories tab for accurate tax exports.
products.importDescription: Upload a Nayax product export (.xlsx). Products, categories, and images will be imported automatically.
products.dropFile: Drop .xlsx file here or click to browse

warehouse.title: Warehouse
warehouse.createFirstWarehouse: Create your first warehouse to start tracking inventory.
warehouse.expirationHint: Optional — leave empty if the product has no expiration
warehouse.minStockDescription: Set minimum stock levels per product for warehouse "{name}".
warehouse.deleteWarehouseConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? All stock and history for this warehouse will be permanently deleted.
warehouse.refillReturnDescription: Items returned after a refill took too much
warehouse.selectProductAndQuantity: Please select a product and enter a quantity
warehouse.positionsEmpty: No products in this warehouse. Book incoming stock first.
warehouse.positionsDescription: Define the physical order of products in your warehouse. Pick lists will follow this order.
warehouse.deleteGroupConfirm: Delete "{name}"? Subgroups will also be deleted. Products will not be removed.
warehouse.velocitySettingDescription: Time period used to calculate average daily sales and estimated stock range.

devices.title: Devices
devices.registerDescription: Generate a one-time provisioning code for a new embedded device. The device will be registered without creating a vending machine — you can assign it to a machine later.
devices.step1: Connect your phone to the device's WiFi network — pick the network starting with 'VMflow-'. Fresh devices have an open WiFi (no password needed); claimed devices show their password in the management UI under their device entry.
devices.step3: Tap Scan QR Code and scan the code above — or enter the code and server URL manually
devices.step4: Select your WiFi network and save — the device will register automatically
devices.deleteConfirmation: Are you sure you want to delete device {device}?
devices.assignedWarning: This device is currently assigned to {machine}. The machine will be unassigned but its configuration and sales history will be preserved.
devices.scanQrHint: Scan this QR code on the device setup page

members.title: Members
members.inviteLinkDescription: Share this link with the invited user. They can register and join your organization in one step.

firmware.title: Firmware
firmware.noFirmwareYet: No firmware versions uploaded yet. Upload a .bin firmware file to get started.
firmware.noReleasesFound: No releases with firmware binaries found.
firmware.deployDescription: Select a device to receive this firmware update over-the-air. The device must be online.
firmware.noDevicesForDeploy: No devices with assigned machines found.
firmware.uploadDescription: Upload a compiled firmware binary (.bin) for OTA deployment to your devices.
firmware.selectFile: Please select a firmware binary file
firmware.offlineWarning: {count} device is offline — update will be delivered when it comes online | {count} devices are offline — update will be delivered when they come online
firmware.deployDescription_multi: Select devices to receive this firmware update over-the-air.
firmware.changelogFetchFailed: Changelog could not be loaded from GitHub. Showing the stored notes instead.
firmware.fullFlashTooltip: Full Flash supports first-time installation via the web installer. App Only is suitable for OTA updates.

apiKeys.title: API Keys
apiKeys.description: Manage API keys for external integrations. Use these keys to call the API from your own applications.
apiKeys.usageInstruction: Use your API key with the {header} header to authenticate requests.
apiKeys.copyWarning: Copy this key now. It will not be shown again.
apiKeys.mcpDescription: The same API keys work with the MCP server. Point an MCP client (OpenClaw, Claude, Cursor …) at the URL below and the API endpoints become available as tools automatically.
apiKeys.mcpAuth: Authenticate with the {header} header (transport: Streamable HTTP). Destructive device actions (OTA, config) are hidden by default.

history.title: History
history.subtitle: Platform activity log — updated in real time
history.eventsWillAppear: Events will appear here as they happen.

settings.title: Account Settings
settings.noAccessHint: No settings available for your role.
settings.emailDescription: Update your email address. A confirmation link will be sent to the new address.
settings.passwordDescription: Update your password. Use at least 6 characters.
settings.appearanceDescription: Customize the look and feel of the dashboard.
settings.emailUpdated: Confirmation email sent to your new address. Please check your inbox.
settings.noSubscriptions: No subscriptions found. Make sure notifications are enabled.
settings.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters
settings.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address
settings.iosGuidance: On iOS, push notifications only work when the app is added to your Home Screen. Tap the share button in Safari, then select "Add to Home Screen".
settings.browserNotSupported: Push notifications are not supported in this browser.
settings.notificationsBlocked: Notifications are blocked. Open Settings → VMflow → Notifications and enable them, then come back here.
settings.permissionDenied: Notification permission was blocked. Please allow notifications in your browser settings, then refresh the page.
settings.pushDescription: Receive alerts on this device even when the browser is closed.
settings.testNotificationDescription: Send a test push to verify the full flow.
settings.imprintDescription: Legally required contact details shown on the public machine page for customers (§5 TMG in Germany).
settings.aiInsightsDescription: Connect your Anthropic API key to enable AI-powered machine insights and recommendations.
settings.lowStockDescription: Get a daily summary of products that newly dropped below their minimum stock since the last push. Disabled means no automatic push — entries still appear on the Warehouse page.
settings.stripeDescription: Connect your Stripe account to accept mobile payments on the public machine page.
settings.stripeKeysRequired: Secret key and publishable key are required.
settings.stripeWebhookHelp: Add this URL as a webhook endpoint in your Stripe Dashboard (event: payment_intent.succeeded).
settings.dealsDescription: Automatically search local retailers for offers that match your warehouse products.
settings.dealsEnableHint: Search Rewe, Lidl, Kaufland and more for current offers on your products.
settings.dealsZipCodeHint: Your location for regional offers. Leave empty for nationwide results.
settings.dealsRefreshHourHint: Fetch new deals once a day at this hour (company timezone). New offers trigger a push and show on the dashboard.
settings.dealsGenericTermsHint: verschiedene, sorten, dose, flasche, drink, ml...
settings.dealsAppPatternsHint: mit app, netto-app, lidl plus, app-preis...
settings.taxSettingsDescription: Configure tax classes and rates for your company. These are used for tax-compliant sales exports.
settings.companyCountryHint: Default country for all machines. Machines can override this individually.
settings.noTaxRates: No tax rates configured for this class.
settings.deleteTaxClassConfirm: Delete this tax class? All associated rates will be removed.
settings.backfillDescription: Updates older sales records with tax data based on current configuration.
settings.backfillNoChanges: All sales already have tax data — nothing to update.
settings.timezoneHint: Operator-wide timezone used for scheduled daily notifications (low stock & new deals).
settings.timezoneContextHint: Send time is in {tz}. Change it under operator information.
settings.dealsProvidersHint: Deals need at least one active source. Marktguru is enabled automatically when you turn deals on.

softap.title: WiFi access (SoftAP)
softap.openAp: This device's SoftAP is currently open (no password).
softap.openApHint: Factory-reset the device and re-claim it from the management UI to assign a unique per-device password.
softap.qrHelp: Scan with your phone's camera to connect automatically.

deals.title: Deals
deals.notEnabledDescription: Enable the deal search feature in settings to automatically find retailer offers for your products.
deals.noDeals: No deals found for your products. Try refreshing or adding more products to your catalog.
deals.noArchived: No archived deals. Archive deals you're not interested in to keep the list focused.
deals.newTooltip: New since the last refresh — pin or archive it to clear it

keywords.title: Keywords
keywords.label: Label
keywords.termsHint: Press Enter or comma to add
keywords.modalHint: When any of the search terms appears in an offer, one deal card is shown covering all linked products.
keywords.emptyHint: Example: a "Haribo" group with terms "Haribo Fruchtgummis", "Haribo versch. Sorten" linked to every Haribo product — brand-wide offers then show up as a single card.
keywords.noLinkedProducts: No products linked to this group yet — edit the group to add products.

deals.noProvidersDescription: Deals need at least one active source to fetch offers.

reconcile.title: Nayax Sales Reconciliation
reconcile.subtitle: Upload a Nayax sales export and find sales that didn't make it into the database.

upload.description: Upload a Nayax sales export file (.xlsx) from your Nayax back-office. Detected columns: Transaction ID, Machine settlement time, Amount, Product selection info, Machine ID.
upload.dropHere: Drop a file here or click to select

mapping.title: Map machines
mapping.intro: The Nayax machine IDs below are not yet mapped to any of your machines. Pick the right machine for each row. The mapping is saved and used for all future uploads.
mapping.viewerNotice: Only admins can save mappings. You can still analyze the file — unmapped machines will appear at the end.

settings.title: Reconciliation settings
settings.tzHint: Nayax timestamps are interpreted in this timezone and converted to UTC for comparison.

results.selectAllMissingAria: Select all {n} missing rows for import
results.importConfirmBody: {n} Nayax rows will be created as manual sales. Continue?
results.adjustStockHint: Off by default — reconciled sales are usually historical and the stock was already counted at refill.
results.deleteConfirmBody: The sale will be deleted. This cannot be undone.
results.restoreStockHint: On by default — a phantom sale never dispensed a product, so the stock is put back. Turn off if the physical stock already matches reality and should not be over-counted.
results.allMatched: All Nayax sales are present in the database.
results.noGhosts: No extra sales in the database.
results.unmappedHint: These Nayax machine IDs are not mapped to any of your machines. These rows are not analyzed.
results.unparseableHead: {n} rows without a parseable slot number
results.ghostExplain: These sales are in the database but not in Nayax — likely false or double-counted sales. Review and remove them.
results.bucketedNotice: Large dataset on {machines} — matched day by day.

errors.parser.noSheet: The file does not contain a readable sheet.
errors.parser.tooLarge: The file is too large (>50,000 rows). Please split it into smaller date ranges.
errors.parser.unknown: Could not read the file. Is this really a Nayax sales export?
errors.parser.missingHeader.txId: Column "Transaktions-ID" is missing — is this really a Nayax sales export?

reports.title: Reports
reports.noData: Select a date range and click "Load data" to preview sales.
reports.taxNotReadyDescription: {count} categories have no tax class assigned. Exports are disabled until all categories are configured.
reports.nayaxReconcileBlurb: Compare a Nayax sales export against the database and find missing sales.

inbox.title: Customer inbox
inbox.subtitle: Problem reports, feedback and product wishes submitted from the public machine page.
inbox.emptyHint: When customers submit a problem, feedback or product wish from a machine page, it will appear here.

cashBook.title: Cash Book
cashBook.name: Name
cashBook.gobdDescription: This cash book complies with GoBD requirements and is fully audit-proof.
cashBook.emptyStateDescription: A cash register manages the cash from your vending machines.
cashBook.correctionOfferMessage: There is a difference of {amount}. Would you like to create a correction entry?
cashBook.reversalConfirmMessage: Reverse entry #{number}? This creates a counter-entry and cannot be undone.
cashBook.deleteWarning: Warning: This action cannot be undone!
cashBook.deleteWarningEntries: All {count} entries will be permanently deleted
cashBook.deleteWarningMachines: All assigned machines will be unassigned from this cash register
cashBook.deleteWarningIrreversible: The GoBD-compliant booking history will be lost
cashBook.deleteTypeName: Type the name "{name}" to confirm deletion:
cashBook.thresholdHint: When the cash-box balance reaches this value, the "Deposit to bank" button is highlighted.
cashBook.expectedFromMachinesHint: The coin changer can hold cash back — small differences from the expected amount are normal.
cashBook.trackPerMachineHint: Pick the source machine on every withdrawal. Usually not useful when collecting from multiple machines on one tour.

publicStorefront.machineNotFoundDesc: This vending machine could not be found. Please check the URL.
publicStorefront.notifyTitle: Get notified when "{product}" is back in stock
publicStorefront.notifySuccess: You'll be notified when this product is back in stock.
publicStorefront.notifyError: Could not subscribe. Please try again.
publicStorefront.wishTitle: Which product would you like to see in this machine?
publicStorefront.wishSuccess: Thank you for your product wish!
publicStorefront.wishError: Could not submit wish. Please try again.
publicStorefront.creditDelivered: Credit has been sent to the machine.
publicStorefront.creditDeliveryFailed: Payment succeeded. Credit will be delivered shortly.
publicStorefront.selectOnMachine: Please select your product on the machine display.
publicStorefront.reportProblemDesc: Let the operator know what's wrong with this machine.
publicStorefront.reportProblemPlaceholder: Describe the problem (e.g. machine won't accept coins, item stuck, display broken)…
publicStorefront.giveFeedbackDesc: Share your thoughts with the operator.
publicStorefront.feedbackError: Could not submit. Please try again.

publicMap.title: Vending Machines
publicMap.subtitle: Find your favorite snack nearby
publicMap.operatorEmpty: This operator has no public machines yet

mobileApp.title: Mobile App Setup
mobileApp.description: Connect the VMflow iOS app to this server.
mobileApp.step2: Tap "Add Self-hosted" on the login screen

install.title: Flash VMflow Firmware
install.intro: Flash your ESP32-S3 board with VMflow firmware directly from your browser. No development tools required.
install.prereqInternet: Internet access (the flashing engine is loaded from a CDN)
install.step1Connect: Connect your ESP32-S3 board to your computer via USB
install.step2Boot: If the device is not detected, hold the BOOT button while connecting the USB cable
install.unsupported: Your browser does not support Web Serial. Please use Chrome 89+ or Edge 89+.
install.noNotes: No release notes available for this version.
install.afterStep1: The device restarts and creates a WiFi hotspot named
install.afterStep2: Connect to this hotspot with your phone or laptop. A captive portal will open automatically.
install.afterStep3: Select your WiFi network and enter the password.
install.afterStep4: Enter the 8-character provisioning code from the management dashboard.
install.afterStep5: The default server URL is pre-filled and usually does not need to be changed.
install.afterStep6: The device connects to your network and appears in the management dashboard.
install.provisioningHint: How to generate a provisioning code
install.provisioningHintDetail: Open the management dashboard, go to the Devices page, and click "Register New Device". An 8-character code will be generated that is valid for 24 hours.
install.noVersions: No firmware versions available yet. An admin needs to publish firmware first.

extensions.pageDescription: Activate and configure data sources and integrations per company.
extensions.builtinDescription: Bundled with VMflow. Toggle on/off; no further configuration needed in v1.
extensions.webhookDescription: Connect your own service via HTTPS. Each company runs and trusts its own webhooks.

dealSource.title: Deal sources
dealSource.description: Where the Deals page pulls weekly retailer offers from. Marktguru is enabled by default; add more sources via custom webhooks.

webhook.help: Connect a custom HTTPS endpoint that implements the deal-source contract. See docs/extension-points/deal-source.md.
webhook.name: Display name
webhook.confirmDelete: Delete this webhook provider? Sales will no longer pull from it.

errors.configJsonInvalid: Extra config must be a JSON object
